# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  outputs:
    storageAccountName: {type: 'string'}
    primaryWebEndpoint: {type: 'string'}

variables:
  location: 'eastus'
  skuName: 'Standard_LRS'

parameters:
  storageAccountNamePrefix: {'type': 'string', 'defaultValue': 'mystorageaccount'}

functions:
  createOrUpdateBlobContainer:
    type: 'Functions.Azure.Resources.Storage.createOrUpdateBlobContainer'
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
    armType: 'Microsoft.Web/sites'
    properties:
      publicAccessLevel: 'blob'

parameters:
  storageAccountName: {'type': '@parameters("storageAccountName")'}
  containerName: {'type': 'string'}

main:
  type: 'Microsoft.Resources/templates'
  apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
  parameters:
    location: {value: variables.location}
    storageAccountNamePrefix: {value: parameters.storageAccountNamePrefix}

  resources:
    - name: storageaccount
      type: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'
      apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
      location: {value: variables.location}
      properties:
        sku:
          name: {value: variables.skuName}
        kind: 'StorageV2'
        creationTimestamp: UTCNow()
      tags: {}
      dependsOn: []
      output:
        storageAccountName: {value: '@resourceId(@self)/name'}
        primaryWebEndpoint: {value: '[ concat(parameters(storageAccountNamePrefix), "/", resources.storageaccount.primaryEndpoints.web.rawValue]']}

    - name: websitecontainer
      type: 'Functions.Azure.Resources.Storage.createOrUpdateBlobContainer'
      apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
      armType: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers'
      parameters:
        storageAccountName: {value: '@parameters(storageAccountName)'}
        containerName: {value: 'websitecontainer'}
      dependsOn: [storageaccount]
